title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Cursor's VP of Engineering discusses how agentic workflows can overcome the 40% productivity plateau that most companies hit with AI coding assistants by automating tasks across the entire SDLC, including bug triage, security review, and growth experimentation. The talk covers agent architecture, human-AI collaboration design, and organizational shifts needed to deploy agent teams effectively.
